remaining_gaps: Result Evaluation Runtime is not implemented.
Improvement Proposal Runtime is not implemented.
Improvement Review Runtime is not implemented.
Improvement Approval Runtime is not implemented.
Improvement Implementation Planning Runtime is not implemented.
Execution request creation from approved implementation plans is not defined or implemented.
Operational replay reconstruction tests are missing for foundation-only artifacts.

constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance remains optional and non-authoritative throughout governed learning.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates evidence and records artifacts, while human authority is required for approval.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Worker output remains upstream evidence, not approval or self-improvement authority.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Replay records append-only evidence and may reconstruct history without mutation.
